question: Create a class ArrayInt with data members: int* ptr (dynamic array) and int size. Implement: Default constructor, Overloaded constructor (deep copy), Copy constructor (deep copy), Destructor, Getters/Setters, Display Function. Overload operators: ==, !=, += (append ArrayInt/int), -= (remove ArrayInt/int).
errors: Returning reference to local variable in operator+=
Incorrect semantic meaning for operator+= (subtraction instead of addition)
